description: Source of truth for the OS harness RAILS: states, kinds, executionContexts, boundary, sequence (the blueprint), chain, environment, governance. Component ROWS live in harness/the manifest census; the doctor (governance/checks/doctor.mjs) merges the two and checks reality against them. harness/manifest.md is the generated human-readable twin (run harness/render.mjs). Components merged in from the manifest census (os-reshape P1): the registry IS the components array.

component.rule: Contract-keyed: MAJOR = contract break (input/output/exit); MINOR = contract-compatible behavior added; PATCH = internal fix. Bumped per component; a line is added to the co-located CHANGELOG.md (generated from registry.components[].versions[]).

harnessRelease.rule: DELIBERATE — cut only when the accumulated state is worth naming. generation bumps on a rails/boundary shift; release increments per cut. Pins the component set in .system/releases/<generation.release>.json; the git tag is the capture. NOT a rollup of component bumps.

osArchitecture.rule: OUTERMOST + rarest — bumped only on a tier / boundary (docs/BOUNDARY.md) / data-schema-shape change; recorded via a governance-ledger entry. Governed by governance-check, NEVER by the doctor.

executionContexts.notes: Original authoritative checkout. Tracker server + Overseer loop + launchd jobs run here.

executionContexts.host: Claude Code on the web (ephemeral container)
executionContexts.notes: Co-canonical per decision 2026-06-30. Laws must key off repo identity, not the absolute path. Local-path hooks (Law 5/6) do not currently fire here — see governance.gaps.

boundary.model: directory+manifest, one branch; lifecycle state DECOUPLED from location
boundary.productionDir: harness/ (kernel: loop/ + guard/) and apps/ (userland; one folder per app)
boundary.note: Type is a field, not a folder. Candidates live in apps/_drafts/ (apps) or in harness/loop|guard/ with state=candidate (kernel parts awaiting admission). Admission = a human-reviewed manifest state flip (+ move out of _drafts/ for apps) — never a self-admitted state edit; CODEOWNERS gates the manifest.

stages.contract: MISSING formal Deploy stage contract; only checklist-auto-mode-deployment-readiness exists
MISSING — no Monitor stage, template, or post-Done observation loop

sequence.description: The blueprint — the harness's canonical end-to-end shape: session -> idea -> understand -> shape -> execute -> assure -> ship -> observe. Each step maps to a declared component and/or chain stage. This is the harness's testable shape (the 'blueprint'), distinct from the 'chain' (the build-pipeline stages it wraps); the doctor checks that every step resolves and that no production step depends on a sandbox component.

steps.note: Must key off repo-identity so it binds in both local and cloud.
Today the tagger runs per-step feeding the Orchestrator (step 8); declared here as the intended upstream signal step.

steps.produces: built artifacts in an isolated target

steps.note: deployer is state=staging; ship step is not yet production-ready.

steps.produces: (MISSING) post-deploy monitoring + feedback into new units

claudeCode.note: .claude/settings.local.json (the file wiring SessionStart + PreToolUse hooks) is NOT in the repo. Only away-gate-settings.snippet.json is tracked. claude-global-settings.json is a sample, not active config.

skills.note: Skills active in a session (deep-research, code-review, etc.) are host/account-level and undeclared.

plugins.note: No plugins dir or manifest in repo.

gaps: No tracked settings.json -> hook wiring (the laws' backbone) lives outside the repo
No skills/plugins manifest -> session capability set is invisible and non-reproducible

governance.model: Three layers: Principles (advisory) -> Laws (programmatic, fail-closed) -> GitHub (platform).

laws.name: Auto Mode Escape
laws.enforced: staging — away-gate not wired by default

github.note: CODEOWNERS is inert until branch protection is configured on GitHub.

buildRules: A component enters the production harness only via the promotion contract (frame->...->test + human approval).
Production never depends on sandbox or quarantined components.
Every harness change is a manifest change; an undeclared wired surface is a drift error.
The environment (settings/hooks/plugins/skills/MCP/contexts) is pinned in-repo and checked.
Master is the single source of truth; branches are transient change vehicles merged via PR + protection.
gaps: core.hooksPath not configured -> local laws may not fire on fresh clone / cloud
GitHub branch protection not configured -> no platform-level stop ('lost control' risk remains)
No promote/quarantine CLI -> promotion is manual STATUS editing

components.role: Signal extractor: derives routing tags from a step (purpose, deterministic, needsIndependence, breadth, heavyOffThread, producesReasoning)
components.trigger: Before the Orchestrator routes each step
components.evidence: Deterministic heuristic; the 'signal extractor' the chain begins with

components.role: Pre-Orchestrator classifier: is the Clarifier worthwhile (fuzzy + grounded)? Routes run-clarifier / gather-info / self-state / ground-first
Transcript/request -> grounded End State (goal, conditions, assumptions, definition of done)
flags: two meanings stores (clarifier.db vs confirmed-meanings.db) pending unification

components.role: End State -> bounded, viable Scope (in/out items with traceability)
Scope -> atomic, ordered, rubric-checked build plan
Coordinates plan execution: build-gate -> provision -> topo-sort -> per-step execute/verify/retry/reframe/escalate -> acceptance
Executes one atomic step: mechanical -> template codegen, novel -> model; confines writes to worktree
Bounded catalog of deterministic codegen templates
Runs shell/predicate checks on produced artifacts; honest about unrunnable checks
components.trigger: After each build step and in Tester

components.role: Whole-build acceptance: rules + deterministic check-generation + adversarial subagent review; never model-verifies
Deploy gate + sign-off + verify + auto-rollback; auto only for preview/staging/non-client/low-impact
flags: built but not wired into a live flow; no formal Deploy stage contract yet

components.role: Prepares an isolated git worktree as a build target; teardown
Routes each step to the cheapest sufficient execution tier (script/subagent/model); logs audit trail; loop/stop control

versions.change: Raise doctor-dispatch spawnSync timeout 5s→30s — the 5s fail-open guard cut off a legitimate 1–7s doctor under load (flaky os: block decision).
os-reshape P1: relocated to harness/loop/orchestrator/ (in-place reshape; behaviour unchanged unless noted in the P1 ledger entry gov-2026-07-01-043).
P1 peer-review fix: doctor handler FAIL-LOUD (no fabricated clean bill on crash/empty output — eval C6) + hardened main-guard (pathToFileURL).
os-reshape P2: OS_ROOT boot-root indirection (explicit runtime root for sealed/launcher boots; default file-relative derivation unchanged).

components.role: Pure routing policy: tags -> tier ladder; verification never uses model; fail-safe defaults to script
Top-down task-tree builder: confidence gate -> cut -> atomicity -> depth budget -> store -> dependencies
Management agent: scheduling (DAG/critical path), determinism audit, scope-creep, convergence, snapshot
Zero-dependency SQLite server on port 4319: event store + reducer + overseer loop; spawns decomposer/judge/learning workers
Append-only event store (work.db) + observation store (obs.db: flags, agent_runs, chain_runs)
Stateless read model: derives current unit state and parent/child tree from the event log
Deterministic clarify->scope->plan->build->test->deploy chain with per-stage gates, budget, and chain-run persistence

versions.change: os-reshape P1: relocated to apps/_drafts/pipeline/ (in-place reshape; behaviour unchanged unless noted in the P1 ledger entry gov-2026-07-01-043).
os-reshape P2: symlink-proof CLI main-guard (cliInvoked realpath) — the silent-no-op class killed repo-wide after the sealed-boot repro.

components.role: Away-work runner: select reversible/valuable units -> playback -> runtime select -> fan out thin workers under a concurrency cap
flags: approve-mode trusted; tool-use execution trust still pending (Gate B)

components.role: Polls Claude/Codex transcript telemetry; adaptive rotation thresholds; writes trigger events; can auto-prepare handoff
Pre-push gate: status truth, session registry, live-path, branch ownership, post-handoff, write-branch, template conformance, chain-state attestation
flags: only fires if core.hooksPath is configured; not configured in fresh clones / cloud

components.role: Active-session registry, duplicate-topic collision guard, push visibility, post-handoff write caution
Frame/Scope/Plan must conform to templates; 4 visibility states (hidden-structural, hidden-needs-agent-review, ready-for-human-review, approved); spillover routing
Deterministic digest over STATUS chain/pre-frame/queue; blocks chain edits unless attestation matches HEAD
Asserts the active session branch matches the git write branch
Audits and prunes merged session branches/worktrees
Turns template/git/host-capability signals into durable approval records (SQLite + JSONL); exact-file commits on session branches only
flags: no read API / unified violation dashboard yet (Law 11 partial)

components.role: Git pre-push entry point that delegates to decision-enforcer
flags: core.hooksPath NOT configured by default -> hook may not fire; install-managed-hooks.sh is manual

components.role: PreToolUse safety gate for Auto Mode: allow read/test/git-safe/draft, deny deploy/external-send/money/destructive
components.trigger: Every tool call while Auto Mode active
flags: snippet exists but not merged into an active settings.json -> not wired by default

components.role: UserPromptSubmit hook intercepting 'approve <item> <stage>' prompts
UserPromptSubmit hook for +task / +list instant capture (no model turn)
SessionStart: validate workspace binding, fail-closed on wrong checkout, inject continuity packet
flags: hardcodes local path -> fails closed in cloud context; must move to repo-identity (both-first-class decision)

components.role: Drift-check: validates this manifest against disk, wiring, environment, and the production-never-depends-on-sandbox rule
components.trigger: harness doctor / pre-push (to be wired in Phase 1)
flags: new in this pass; not yet wired into pre-push

versions.change: checkVersionBumpOnChange now diffs the working tree (not HEAD) so it fires at pre-commit verification; also reflects the sandbox→candidate guard change.

checkVersionBumpOnChange now also excludes *.test.mjs from the substantive-change filter — a test-only change no longer forces a component version bump (version is contract-keyed to shipped behavior, not test coverage).
os-reshape P1: relocated to governance/checks/doctor.mjs (in-place reshape; behaviour unchanged unless noted in the P1 ledger entry gov-2026-07-01-043).
P1 peer-review fix: contract scan widened to apps/ (userland contracts back under schema validation) + hardened main-guard.
os-reshape P2: symlink-proof CLI main-guard (cliInvoked realpath) — the silent-no-op class killed repo-wide after the sealed-boot repro.

os-reshape P3 (P2 peer-review): root-is-toplevel guard on checkVersionBumpOnChange — a sealed snapshot nested in the workbench repo no longer inherits parent git context (verify-at-publish == verify-at-boot).

components.role: Discovery/research lane: grounded knowledge with cited sources
flags: schema only; no agent entry point; unwired

components.role: Explains a target file as a Frame; grounded, never invents
flags: built but never called by any live flow

components.role: Retrospective optimizer: combs prior-day agent_runs for inefficiencies; proposes, never auto-applies
Overnight prototype/eval corpus (rubric v2, decomposer prototypes)
flags: ~26M generated artifacts; candidate for sandbox/ relocation

components.role: Clarifier gate bake-off corpus and calibration
Legacy work-tracker UI design-system build
Ad-hoc worker stub
Minimal orchestrator: classify a signal, route it to a component, record a terminal outcome (the first wired path)
components.trigger: a signal arrives at a door
flags: minimal first wiring; dispatch table still hard-coded — deriving it from the manifest census is a later wiring step

components.role: PreToolUse write-lock: a WRITE to a harness component acquires/refreshes the component's single-writer lock; a WRITE colliding with a LIVE foreign lock is blocked. Control: fail-closed on a live conflict, fail-open on any guard error.

components.role: Migration test rig for the os-reshape plan: golden-master capture/compare (F5), the §D2 eval battery, fault-injection rigs, the sealed-boot S-matrix (RED until P2), concurrency rigs (RED until P3), scoped grep-gate

versions.change: Initial version (P0 of the os-reshape plan: rigs + golden master + RED-first battery).

M1 peer-review fixes: hermeticity (verbatim symlinks, env stripping, async timeouts, no state/ copy, retry), correctness (G6 release sort, explicit-red assertions, strict S/X predicates), coverage (G7/G8/O2/M2/W1/W2/W4, S6-S8, X2 split, functional X1, grep-gate wired, coverage table + battery baseline).
os-reshape P1: relocated to apps/_drafts/reshape-rig/ (in-place reshape; behaviour unchanged unless noted in the P1 ledger entry gov-2026-07-01-043).
os-reshape P2: symlink-proof CLI main-guard (cliInvoked realpath) — the silent-no-op class killed repo-wide after the sealed-boot repro.
os-reshape P3 (P2 peer-review): grep-gate excludes sealed .system/releases/<v>/ — immutable history records the paths of its era.
P4 evidence pack finalized (R1 drill result recorded). Doc-only; the version-bump mandate treats evidence as substantive — complying is cheaper than special-casing the control.

components.role: Sealed-runtime publisher: assembles the release snapshot (.system/releases/<v>/), CUT-THEN-VERIFY (doctor + no-ghost + hostile boot smoke INSIDE the snapshot), atomically repoints current|next; --verify + --boot-check (the boot banner). Fail-closed control.

versions.change: Initial version (os-reshape P2: sealed runtime + cut-then-verify + boot-check/banner).
os-reshape P3: publish lock (serialized publishes, X3) + post-rename FINAL-location re-verify (rename-invariance is false — verify what boots).

Release 1.0: .claude host wiring sealed into every image (boot contract travels with the release; settings.local.json excluded) + explicit per-release file inventory (SNAPSHOT.json files[] + FILES.txt).
